mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_NO, REVIEW_NO FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, STAGE_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE FROM REVIEWS JOIN MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'Y'
